name: Harvey
description: Harvey — Generative AI legal research and drafting platform trained on case law for law firms and legal teams.

seo.title: Harvey — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Harvey: Harvey — Generative AI legal research and drafting platform trained on case law for law firms and legal teams.

when_to_use: Drafting legal documents and memos with AI legal reasoning
Automating contract review and due diligence for law firms
Researching case law with AI-powered legal search and analysis
Accelerating M&A diligence workflows with AI document review

pros: Trained on deep legal corpora for high-quality drafting
Strong on research and memo workflows
cons: Expensive seats beyond reach of small firms
Still requires lawyer review for every output
review.verdict: The enterprise-grade legal copilot if you can afford it and have compliance bandwidth.
review.best_for: Large law firms and in-house legal teams with serious research volume
review.not_for: Solo practitioners or non-legal users wanting general-purpose drafting

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
